channel.title: 1000 Songs - Sonic Archive Updates
channel.description: Latest updates, news, and community comments from the 1000 Songs archive.

item.title: researchbuzz.me
item.description:
Josh (news):

Thanks very much to Tara Calishain for the mention on : researchbuzz.me!

item.title: Sonic Journal Blog
item.description:
Josh (news):

I have created a blog: Sonic Journal!

item.title: We Were Here
item.description:
Josh (comment):

Shout out to We Were Here: A History of Black People and Alternative Music by Stephanie Phillips. Can't wait to dive in!

item.title: Every Noise at Once
item.description:
Josh (comment):

Reached out to Glenn McDonald at Every Noise at Onceand got some feedback! Very grateful!

item.title: Welcome from Hacker News
item.description:
Josh (news):

Hello Hacker News people! Very much would welcome messages or suggestions! https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48678717

item.title: 923 Songs
item.description:
Josh (news):

I'm up to 923 songs now. Mainly struggling with 1930s and 1940s. Any suggestions send them my way!

item.title: Albums
item.description:
Josh (news):

I've added an albums section now. I have started this one at 1960. So only 700 albums.

item.title: Sonic Stories!
item.description:
Josh (news):

I've added a sister project where you can add memories of venues, places and scenes. Click on the Sonic Stories section.

item.title: New Forum Feature!
item.description:
Josh (news):

I've added forum. Post on there and I can add the info to the site.

item.title: New Community Comments Feature!
item.description:
Josh (news):

I've added a new section where you can leave comments or suggest tracks. Drop a note using the form below, and I'll add my favorites to this feed.

item.title: Loving the 90s picks
item.description:
RadioLover99 (comment):

Really enjoying the 1990s section, specifically the Portishead choices. Have you thought about adding Tricky to 1995?

item.title: Radio Time Machine
item.description:
Sarah_T (comment):

The static effect between stations on the radio dial is such a great touch. It really feels like tuning an old AM radio.

item.title: Lewisham Archive Added
item.description:
Josh (news):

Just uploaded the new Lewisham community archive to the community search page. Check it out to see the latest additions.
